name: Sejong Medical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sejong Medical Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and supplies laparoscopic surgery systems and equipment in South Korea. It offers trocar, single port, specimen pouch, suction irrigation, suture loop, smoke filter, BUMI, and ETC products. Sejong Medical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is based in Paju, South Korea.
